_comment: Model-per-step config (SEAM #2). Step boundaries + model IDs ONLY. This does NOT bind the system to any runtime (Claude Code / Codex / SDK / MCP); whatever runtime executes a step reads its model id here. Change a value to route a step to a different model.

route.purpose: base + archetype routing (light; mixed deterministic precedence + latent JD read)

score.purpose: latent ship-check items; deterministic gates run in score-resume.mjs
